title: mls: secret_bytes not zeroized in room_hpke_keypair()
description: mls.rs:389-396: secret_bytes is [u8;32] stack-allocated from group.export_secret(), then moved into StaticSecret::from(secret_bytes) without being zeroized first. The export_secret output is a live HPKE secret key. The return value is correctly wrapped in Zeroizing<[u8;32]>, but the intermediate secret_bytes on the stack is not cleared. Fix: mut-bind secret_bytes and call secret_bytes.zeroize() before returning, matching the pattern in identity::from_secret_bytes.
